channel.title: Posts on upyesp
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on upyesp

item.title: How To Avoid Long OneDrive Folder Names
item.description: If your employer or university provides you with Microsoft OneDrive, you’ll know how useful it can be right? The OneDrive folder name tends to be very long though, like “OneDrive - The University of Quahog”. The long name can get in the way, like in the prompt of an IDE, in a terminal session or when browsing files in Explorer. One simple command, mklink, can fix that.

item.title: Browsing A WSL Distro In Explorer
item.description: If you have installed WSL and one or more linux distributions, it is possible to work with the contents of their file systems from within Windows Explorer.
